---
title: "Segregation Ratio Calculator"
output: html_document
date: 2026-01-23
---

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px;">

  <!-- Text on the left -->
  <div style="flex: 1;">
This app runs a Chi-square test to determine whether your T2 seeds fit a 3:1 segregation ratio. Enter the number of seeds that survived, died, and the total number of seeds plated.  
[Check your T2 ratio! 🌱](https://sydne.shinyapps.io/chi-square/)
  </div>

  <!-- Image on the right -->
  <div style="flex: 0 0 250px;">
    <img src="images/Arabidopsis2.png" style="width: 100%; height: auto;">
  </div>

</div>
